title: nasturtium draba
intro: Nasturtium draba, also known as field cress or white cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of vitamins and minerals such as vitamin C, potassium, and iron. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Nasturtium draba can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and wounds.
